g.text: Normal State: Primary Holds Valid Lease
Partition State: Network Split & Lease Expiry

ol.li: Clock Drift: Protocol assumes a bounded clock drift $\Delta$. The safety margin $M$ (T=11s) must be $> \Delta$.
Fencing: New Primary (Node B) increments the Term ID (0x0C). Even if Node A resumes, storage will reject its lower term IDs.
Quorum: A partition cannot have two majorities. Only one side can reach the threshold of $(N/2)+1$.
Invariance: At timestamp $T$, if Node B has a valid lease, Node A's lease MUST be expired in all possible observers.
